/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 12 D/CTS:12/IND/WS/WEAP2/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE ON FORMAL PROBATION THROUGH THE 'TAY' UNIT AT SF ADULT PROBATION OFFICE/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/SA2:INTERSECTION OF GOLDEN GATE AVE & HYDE ST, SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE HIS GPS ANKLE MONITOR REMOVED FORTHWITH/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:DEFENDANT RECEIVED A FAVORABLE PTD PROGRESS REPORT/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 03-13-20/X:BAIL SET AT $2,000/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT STAY STATUS/DOP/

/CAL:RETURN ON BENCH WARRANT/BWDNC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WEAP//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
